# 🎤 Artist Overview
Vozz Rich is an emerging electronic music producer and DJ blending house, techno, and Latin influences into a distinctive sound that bridges underground and commercial dance music. With roots in Mexico and California, his production style incorporates elements of Detroit house, salsa, and big room energy, creating an infectious cross-cultural dance floor experience. His recent collaborations with artists like Kicevski, L25, and Gabriel Robella showcase his versatility and growing influence in the electronic music scene.

# 📊 Performance & Draw
- Spotify Monthly Listeners: 24,778 (steady growth trend)
- Total Spotify Followers: 4,109
- Instagram Following: 4,875
- Strong streaming performance with consistent monthly listener base
- Growing international presence with particular strength in Latin American markets

# 🎧 Recent Releases & Press
Notable 2024 Releases:
- "House Ablaze" (December 2024)
- "Breathless" with L25 (July 2024)
- "Mi Corazon Batalla" (August 2024)
- "Safe and Sound" with Kicevski (October 2024)

Recent Remixes:
- "Sofi Disco" (PAUL PARKER)
- "Dance All Night" (Jaytor)
- "Butterflies" (Artsychoke)

# 🎪 Stage Experience & Technical
Performance Format:
- DJ Sets featuring original productions and remixes
- Versatile programming incorporating house, tech house, and Latin-influenced electronic music
- High-energy performance style focusing on dance floor momentum
